# F1 from READY → HELP overlay showing the index page title and footer.
# The footer shows the navigation hints.
# Step into the 3-column grid (DOWN from the row-0 self-reference lands
# on "About 1-2-3 Help" in column 0). A second DOWN should stay in
# column 0 — i.e. land on "Add-In Commands", NOT on the column-1
# neighbor "Macro Command Index". ENTER follows the column-locked
# choice to verify the correct page loaded.
# BACKSPACE returns to the index, focus reset to the top-of-page link.
# Now exercise RIGHT: from "About 1-2-3 Help" (col 0), one DOWN drops
# us into the grid, RIGHT moves to "Macro Basics" in column 1, ENTER
# ESC closes the overlay and returns to READY without disturbing the
# F1 from POINT (mid-command) also opens Help.
# POINT cancels in two Esc steps (unanchor → cancel).
